title: Terraform Infrastructure
description:
Infrastructure as code for all GCP resources.

Files: terraform/main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, cloud_run.tf, redis.tf, dns.tf, networking.tf, terraform.tfvars.example

Resources: Cloud Run (samfhir-api, port 8000, min 0/max 3), Memorystore Redis (Basic 1GB, private IP), VPC Connector, Cloud DNS zone (projectptah.com), DNS CNAME (api.projectptah.com -> Cloud Run URL), Artifact Registry (referenced, created manually).

Outputs: nameservers, Cloud Run URL, Redis host.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 275-308 (Step 7)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 184-248 (Infrastructure)

title: [manual] GCP Project Setup
description:
Create GCP project, link billing, enable APIs (Cloud Run Admin, Artifact Registry, Cloud DNS, Serverless VPC Access, Memorystore Redis, Cloud Resource Manager). Install and authenticate gcloud CLI.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 15-31 (Manual Steps §1)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 184-248 (Infrastructure section)

title: [manual] Domain DNS Migration
description:
After Terraform creates the Cloud DNS managed zone, update nameservers at the domain registrar for projectptah.com to point to GCP nameservers from terraform output. DNS propagation may take up to 48h.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 45-55 (Manual Steps §3)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 215-235 (DNS Setup)

title: Python Project Scaffolding
description:
Create project structure and configure tooling.

Files: backend/pyproject.toml, backend/Dockerfile, backend/src/samfhir/__init__.py, backend/src/samfhir/main.py, backend/src/samfhir/config.py

Dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], pydantic-settings, redis[hiredis], httpx, fhir.resources, fhirpy, authlib
Dev deps: pytest, pytest-asyncio, httpx, ruff

config.py: pydantic-settings reading SAMFHIR_-prefixed env vars (app_name, debug, host, port, redis_url, fhir_base_url, smart_client_id, smart_redirect_uri, smart_scopes, cors_origins)
main.py: FastAPI app entrypoint with routers, lifespan (Redis connect/disconnect), CORS middleware.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 90-137 (Step 1)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 80-165 (Project Layout), lines 717-745 (Configuration)
close_reason: All 5 files created, uv sync clean, config loads, health endpoints work, ruff passes

title: [manual] Artifact Registry Repository
description:
Create Docker repository in Artifact Registry and configure Docker authentication.

```bash
gcloud artifacts repositories create samfhir --repository-format=docker --location=australia-southeast1 --description='SamFHIR container images'
gcloud auth configure-docker australia-southeast1-docker.pkg.dev
```

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 57-71 (Manual Steps §4)

title: Docker + Local Dev
description:
Containerization and local development setup.

Files: backend/Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml (repo root)

Dockerfile: Multi-stage build — builder stage (python:3.12-slim + uv, install deps), runtime stage (python:3.12-slim, copy packages, run uvicorn).
docker-compose.yml: api service (builds backend/Dockerfile, port 8000, env vars) + redis service (redis:7-alpine, port 6379).

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 256-273 (Step 6)

title: Makefile
description:
Common command targets at repo root.

File: Makefile

Targets: dev (docker compose up --build), test (cd backend && uv run pytest), lint (cd backend && uv run ruff check .), format (cd backend && uv run ruff format .), build (docker build -t samfhir-api backend/), deploy (build + push to Artifact Registry + deploy to Cloud Run).

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 310-329 (Step 8)

title: Tests
description:
Unit and integration tests.

Files: backend/tests/conftest.py, tests/unit/domain/test_patient_service.py, tests/integration/test_patient_router.py, tests/integration/test_redis_cache.py

conftest.py: mock_fhir_port, mock_cache_port, test_client (httpx.AsyncClient with stub adapters)

Unit (test_patient_service.py): service returns patient, summary aggregates, cache hit skips FhirPort, cache miss calls FhirPort then stores.
Integration (test_patient_router.py): health endpoint, patient endpoint JSON, cache stats, cache flush.
Integration (test_redis_cache.py): set/get round-trip, TTL expiry, delete, stats tracking.

Redis integration tests require running Redis (docker compose up redis or testcontainers).

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 331-374 (Step 9)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 749-772 (Testing Strategy)

title: [manual] Terraform State Bucket
description:
Create GCS bucket for Terraform remote state. Must exist before terraform init.

```bash
gcloud storage buckets create gs://samfhir-tfstate --project=samfhir --location=australia-southeast1 --uniform-bucket-level-access
```

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 33-43 (Manual Steps §2)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 237-248 (Terraform State)

title: [manual] Epic FHIR App Registration (Phase 2 Prep)
description:
Register app at fhir.epic.com. Not required for Phase 1 but register early since approval can take time. Set redirect URI to https://api.projectptah.com/smart/callback, FHIR R4, resources: Patient, Observation, Condition, MedicationRequest, AllergyIntolerance. Save the Non-Production Client ID.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 73-84 (Manual Steps §5)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 252-308 (SMART on FHIR Integration)

title: Dependency Wiring
description:
FastAPI Depends() composition root.

File: backend/src/samfhir/dependencies.py

Provides: get_settings (singleton), get_redis (from app lifespan state), get_cache (RedisCacheAdapter), get_fhir_client (StubFhirClient, swapped in Phase 2), get_patient_service (depends on fhir_client + cache).

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 239-254 (Step 5)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 44-56 (Hexagonal Architecture / DI)
close_reason: Created dependencies.py composition root, wired up objects in main.py lifespan, updated routers to use centralized DI

title: Domain Layer
description:
The core — no framework imports allowed here.

Files: backend/src/samfhir/domain/__init__.py, models/__init__.py, models/patient.py, models/observation.py, ports/__init__.py, ports/fhir_port.py, ports/cache_port.py, services/__init__.py, services/patient_service.py

Domain models (frozen dataclasses): Patient, PatientSummary, Condition, Observation, Medication, Allergy
Port ABCs: FhirPort (get_patient, get_patient_summary, search_conditions, search_observations, search_medications, search_allergies), CachePort (get, set, delete, flush, stats)
PatientService: cache-aside pattern orchestrating FhirPort and CachePort.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 139-179 (Step 2)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 427-498 (Domain Models + Port Interfaces)

title: Inbound Adapters (API Routers)
description:
FastAPI routers and response schemas.

Files: backend/src/samfhir/adapters/inbound/__init__.py, inbound/api/__init__.py, inbound/api/health_router.py, inbound/api/patient_router.py, inbound/api/fhir_router.py, inbound/api/schemas/__init__.py, inbound/api/schemas/patient_schemas.py

Endpoints:
- GET /health — status + Redis connectivity
- GET /health/ready — readiness probe for Cloud Run
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id} — get patient
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id}/summary — aggregated summary
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id}/conditions
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id}/observations
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id}/medications
- GET /api/v1/patients/{id}/allergies
- GET /api/v1/cache/stats — hit/miss statistics
- DELETE /api/v1/cache — flush cache

Response schemas (patient_schemas.py): Pydantic DTOs separate from domain models.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 203-237 (Step 4)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 383-401 (API Endpoints)

title: Outbound Adapters
description:
Implement outbound adapter implementations for FhirPort and CachePort.

Files: backend/src/samfhir/adapters/__init__.py, adapters/outbound/__init__.py, adapters/outbound/stub_fhir_client.py, adapters/outbound/redis_cache.py

stub_fhir_client.py: Hardcoded mock data for Jason Argonaut (Epic test patient). Full FhirPort implementation with no external calls. Swapped for epic_fhir_client.py in Phase 2.
redis_cache.py: CachePort via redis.asyncio — get/set(TTL)/delete/flush, stats (hit/miss via INCR), health check method.

Ref: docs/phase_1.md lines 180-201 (Step 3)
Ref: samfhir.md lines 339-371 (Redis Caching Strategy)
